column1: Hi, I'm looking for something to organize papers at our office — what do you have that might work?
column6:

Quick ideas to start:
- Desktop letter trays or multi-tier organizers (great for daily papers and memos)
- Desktop file organizers with slots for hanging folders
- Magazine/file holders for loose documents
- Wall-mounted file organizers to save desk space
- Binder or accordion file organizers for multi-category storage

A few questions to tailor options:
- Letter size, A4, or both?
- How many compartments do you need (2–6+)?
- Color or style preference (black/gray, wood finish, etc.)?
- Desktop or wall-mounted?

column1: Hi, I'm looking for something to hold papers together — what would you recommend?
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to help. Here are a few reliable options to hold papers together, depending on your needs:

- Staples + stapler: neat, permanent binding for small-to-moderate page counts (roughly up to 25 pages). Quick and tidy.
- Binder clips: reusable and adjustable, great for larger stacks or if you’ll add/remove pages later.
- Heavy-duty binder clips or bulldog clips: good for very thick piles or extra grip.
- If papers are already hole-punched: a 3-ring binder or brass fasteners offer a clean, long-term binding option.

If you share roughly how many pages you’re binding and whether you want permanent or removable binding, I can suggest specific products and check current availability. Want me to pull stock for a few picks?

column1: Hi, could you let me know what your return policy is? I recently ordered some sticky notes and I want to understand my options in case I need to send them back.
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to help. Here’s our returns policy in brief:

- Eligibility
  - Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery.
  - An RMA number is required for all returns.
  - Unopened items in original packaging are eligible; opened items, custom-printed items, and Final Sale items are not (Final Sale items cannot be returned).
  - Defective or damaged items can be returned at any time and items shipped in error are always eligible.

- How to start a return
  - Contact our Returns Department with your order number to get an RMA. They’ll issue the RMA, valid for 14 days.
  - Ship the item back with the RMA clearly on the outside of the package, ideally in original packaging with the packing slip. Insured shipping with tracking is recommended.
  - Returns: returns@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3. Hours: Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–6:00 PM EST.

- Refunds
  - Refunds are processed in 5–7 business days to the original payment method.
  - Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective.
  - Return shipping is the customer’s responsibility in most cases, unless defective or we shipped the wrong item.

- Defective items
  - If defective, contact us within 48 hours of delivery (photos help). We can arrange pickup or provide a prepaid return label, and a replacement ships immediately after inspection. Return shipping is covered.

- Exchanges
  - We can exchange items using the same RMA process; price differences may apply.

- Business accounts
  - Some accounts have customized return policies. Your account manager can confirm specifics.

If you’d like, I can help determine your options based on your exact item status (unopened vs opened, packaging, etc.). Do you have your order number, and is the sticky notes still unopened in the original packaging? Would you like me to guide you through starting a return?

column1: Hi there, could you tell me how long shipping usually takes? I'm planning to place an order for some office supplies and want to make sure they arrive in time.
column6:
Hi there! Thanks for asking—shipping times depend on the method you choose. Here’s a quick guide:

- Standard: 3-5 business days. $8.95 flat rate. Free shipping threshold: $100+ merchandise value.
- Expedited: 2-3 business days. $15.95. Order by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing; free shipping on orders $250+.
- Express: 1-2 business days. $24.95. Order by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing; signature required; Mon-Thu only.
- Overnight: Next business day. $39.95. Order by 12:00 PM EST; Mon-Thu only; signature required.

Processing times:
- Orders placed before 2:00 PM EST ship the same business day; after 2:00 PM, they ship the next day.
- Standard items usually take 1 business day to process; some items (special orders) may take 1-2 weeks.

Delivery coverage:
- United States (all 50 states), Canada, and international orders on request for large orders. Tracking is emailed when shipped, and you can check status at www.officeflow.com/track.

If you’d like a precise ETA for your order, tell me:
- destination (US/Canada or other),
- items you’re planning to order, and
- preferred shipping method (standard, expedited, express, or overnight).

I can then estimate timelines and advise on the best option. Would you like me to look up options for your destination and the items you have in mind? If you already have an order in mind, you can also reach our Fulfillment team at fulfillment@officeflow.com.

column1: Hi, I was wondering about your policy on orders — like, what happens if something goes wrong?
column6:
Hi there—great question. Here’s a concise overview of how we handle order issues at OfficeFlow:

- Damaged on delivery: report within 48 hours to fulfillment@officeflow.com. We’ll arrange a replacement or refund immediately; no return needed.

- Lost package: if tracking shows delivered but you didn’t receive it, contact us and we’ll file a carrier claim and ship a replacement (claim typically takes 3–5 business days).

- Wrong item received: email fulfillment@officeflow.com with your order number and details. We’ll ship the correct item same or next business day and provide a return label if needed.

- Cancellations/modifications: before processing, you can modify or cancel within 2 hours of ordering with no fees. After processing starts, cancellations may incur a 15% restocking fee; custom/special-order items can’t be canceled once processing has started.

- Backorders: you’ll be informed; you can wait or substitute. You’re not charged until the backordered item ships.

- Returns/refunds: handled by our Returns Department. Contact returns@officeflow.com for guidance and approval.

- Address changes: before shipment, updates are free if done within 2 hours. After shipment, rerouting may incur a $10–$15 fee.

If you have a specific order, share the order number and what happened and I’ll point you to the right team. Anything else I can check for you today?

column1: Hi there, I was just curious about your policies — like, how does everything work if I need to cancel something?
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to explain how cancellations work at OfficeFlow.

- Before processing begins: If you contact us within 2 hours of placing the order, you can cancel or modify with no fees. Reach our Sales Team at sales@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2 (hours Mon–Fri 8 AM–7 PM EST; Sat 9 AM–2 PM).

- After processing has started: cancels may incur a 15% restocking fee on the order total. Delivery address changes are the only type of modification allowed once processing begins. Custom or special-order items cannot be cancelled after processing starts.

- Backordered items: you can cancel backorders anytime with no penalty; you’re not charged until the item ships.

- If the order has already shipped: cancellations aren’t allowed, but you can return the item under our Returns policy (RMA required). Returns are typically eligible within 30 days of delivery, with details and an RMA issued by our Returns Department.

If you have a specific order in mind, I can guide you on the next best step or point you to the right contact. Would you like me to connect you with a sales rep or help draft an email to sales@officeflow.com?

column1: Hi there! I'm thinking about ordering some manila file folders for our office, but I wanted to ask a couple things first — what's your return policy in case we don't end up needing them all, and also, do you offer free shipping or is there a minimum order amount for that? Thanks!
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to help.

Return policy (highlights):
- You can return most items within 30 days of delivery with an RMA number. Unopened items in original packaging are eligible; opened paper reams and some special items (e.g., Final Sale) are not.
- Defective or damaged items can be returned anytime.
- To start a return, contact our Returns Department for an RMA (returns@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3). The RMA is valid for 14 days.
- Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days. Shipping charges are usually non-refundable unless the return is our error or the item is defective. Return shipping is the customer’s responsibility, except for defective/wrong items.
- Exchanges follow the same process.

Shipping policy (highlights):
- Standard Shipping: $8.95, with free shipping on orders of $100+ merchandise value before tax.
- Expedited Shipping: $15.95, free shipping on orders of $250+.
- Express Shipping: $24.95 (same-day processing by 2:00 PM EST).
- Overnight Shipping: $39.95 (next business day; 12:00 PM cutoff).
- For shipping questions, our Fulfillment team can help at fulfillment@officeflow.com.

If you’d like, I can check current stock and pricing for Manila file folders. Just tell me your preferred size (letter/legal), cut (1/3 or 2/3), any features (tab position, with/without pockets), and the quantity you’re considering.

Would you like me to pull up availability for your folder needs? And is there anything else you’d like to know?

column1: Hi, I'm interested in ordering some spiral notebooks and a few desk tape dispensers for our team. Before I do, could you let me know your return policy and also whether you offer any kind of bulk pricing if I'm ordering larger quantities? Thanks!
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to help with both questions.

Return policy
- You can return items within 30 days of delivery with an RMA number. Unopened items in the original packaging are eligible; opened paper reams are not; final-sale items are not returnable. Defective or damaged items are eligible for return outside the 30-day window, and items shipped in error are always eligible.
- Process: contact Returns at returns@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3 to get an RMA (valid for 14 days). Include your packing slip and use the original packaging when possible; insured shipping with tracking is recommended.
- Refunds: processed within 5-7 business days to the original payment method. Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective. Defective items: we’ll arrange pickup or provide a prepaid label, and ship replacements promptly.
- Exchanges: handled like returns, with potential price differences.
- Business accounts: may have customized return policies—your dedicated account manager can confirm specifics.
- If you have questions, contact Returns at returns@officeflow.com.

Bulk pricing
- We do offer bulk discounts on many items, with contract pricing available for regular high-volume orders.
- Typical bulk threshold: 10 or more units of the same item. Quotes are provided by our Sales Team and are valid for 30 days.
- Minimum order value: $50 before tax/shipping for most customers (business accounts may have different terms).
- How to proceed: share the item numbers and desired quantities, plus your delivery location, and our Sales Team can prepare a bulk quote. You can also reach them at sales@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2.
- For business accounts, you can ask about a dedicated account manager for ongoing pricing and terms.

Would you like me to pull current bulk pricing and availability for specific spiral notebooks and desk tape dispensers? If so, please share:
- Desired notebook size (e.g., 8.5x11, A4), pages, cover color, and any special features
- Tape dispenser type and quantity
- Destination ZIP/postal code (for shipping estimates)
- Rough total quantities

I can then connect you with the right team or get you direct quotes.

column6:

Stock availability
- I’m not seeing an exact “letter size envelopes” item in our system with the search terms I used. Could you share:

  - Color (white, manila, etc.)
  - Quantity per pack
  - Any item number or SKU you have
Once you provide those, I’ll pull the live availability right away. If you don’t have those details, I can have a Sales rep check stock for you—just say the word.

- Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days; $8.95 flat rate. Free shipping on orders $100+ before tax.

- Overnight Shipping: Next business day; $39.95 flat rate. Cutoff at 12:00 PM EST; signature required; Mon-Thu only.
- Processing: Orders placed before 2:00 PM EST ship the same day; standard items take 1 business day to process; some special orders may take 1-2 weeks.
- Delivery coverage: United States (all 50 states), Canada; international on request for large orders.
- Tracking: You’ll get a tracking email when the order ships; track at www.officeflow.com/track (24/7). For issues, contact fulfillment@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5.
- Delivery types: Residential (may require signature) vs. Business (delivery to reception); Hold for Pickup is free.

column1: Hi, we're looking at stocking up on some essentials for our offices — I think we need something for mailing, but I'm not entirely sure what size or type would work best. Can you point me in the right direction?
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to help you get started with mailing essentials. To tailor recommendations, a quick check: are you mainly mailing letters/documents or shipping small items (like books, gadgets, etc.)? Do you prefer self-seal envelopes or traditional gummed, and about how much volume do you handle monthly?

In the meantime, here’s a practical starter kit that covers most offices:

- Envelopes
  - #10 white business envelopes (4 1/8 x 9 1/2 in) for letters and notices
  - Optional: 9x12 or 10x13 document envelopes for larger documents

- Mailers
  - Bubble mailers in common sizes (6x9 and 9x12) for small, fragile items
  - Padded mailers as an alternative for slightly bulkier shipments

- Poly mailers
  - 9x12 or 10x13 for lightweight, non-fragile items or mixed shipments

- Labels and printing
  - Address labels (1" x 2 5/8" or 4" x 6" shipping labels) depending on your printer
  - If you print in-house, I can help find printer-compatible label options

- Packing supplies
  - Packing tape, 2" width (with a tape dispenser for easy use)
  - Bubble wrap or packing paper for added protection
  - Permanent markers for labeling when needed

- Extras (optional)
  - Return label stock or pre-printed return labels if you ship often
  - A simple label printer, if you want faster label production

If you share your typical monthly volume and whether you ship documents, small products, or both, I can fine-tune this list and pull current availability and pricing for the exact items you choose. Want me to check stock for any of these items now?

column1: Hi, I'm the office manager for a mid-size company and we regularly place large orders. Could you walk me through your bulk ordering policy? Specifically, I'd like to know if there's a minimum order threshold to qualify for volume pricing, and how those discounts are structured — is it tiered based on quantity, or a flat rate once you hit a certain amount?
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to outline our bulk ordering policy.

- Minimums: Usually, there’s a $50 minimum order value (before tax and shipping). Established business accounts have no minimum order.

- Bulk pricing and discounts: Available on many items for large quantities. Discounts are quote-based, not a flat rate. You’ll typically receive a custom quote for large orders.

- How the pricing is structured: Bulk discounts aren’t a single tiered percentage published publicly. They’re handled via quotes, and we also offer contract pricing for regular high-volume customers. Typically, bulk quotes apply when ordering 10+ units of the same item.

- How to get a quote or set up bulk purchasing: Reach our Sales Team at sales@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2. Quotes are usually valid for 30 days. For ongoing volume, you can explore a Business Account with a dedicated account manager and negotiated terms (apply at www.officeflow.com/business or via accounts@officeflow.com).

column1: Hi, I'm handling procurement for a mid-size firm and we're looking to set up a recurring supply arrangement. Before we commit, could you let me know what your shipping policy looks like for enterprise-level orders? Specifically, I'd like to understand delivery timeframes, whether there are any expedited shipping options, and if shipping costs are waived above a certain order value.
column6:
Hi there! I’d be happy to outline our enterprise-level shipping policy and how a recurring order program could work.

Delivery timeframes by method
- Standard: 3–5 business days. Orders placed before 2:00 PM EST ship the same day; otherwise, they ship next business day. Standard items typically process in 1 business day.
- Expedited: 2–3 business days. $15.95 flat rate. Same-day processing if ordered by 2:00 PM EST; ships next business day if after.
- Express: 1–2 business days. $24.95 flat rate. Same-day processing by 2:00 PM EST; signature required on delivery; Mon–Thu only.
- Overnight: Next business day. $39.95 flat rate. 12:00 PM EST cutoff; signature required; Mon–Thu only.

Processing and coverage
- Processing: Standard items usually 1 business day; some special orders may take 1–2 weeks.
- Coverage: United States (all 50 states, including AK/HI), APO/FPO with standard shipping; Canada (duties/taxes may apply; extra 1–2 days for customs). International orders for large volumes available on request.

Shipping costs and free thresholds
- Standard: Free shipping on orders of $100+ (before tax and shipping).
- Expedited: Free shipping on orders of $250+.
- Express and Overnight: Not listed as having a free-shipping threshold; standard rates apply.

Tracking and support
- Tracking numbers emailed when shipped; status at www.officeflow.com/track. For issues, contact fulfillment@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5.

Enterprise options for recurring orders
- Business Account: Access to custom shipping rates for high-volume customers and dedicated delivery routes in major metro areas. Contact your account manager for details.
- For a recurring program, starting a Business Account is typically the best path. We can arrange negotiated terms, consolidated monthly billing, and PO processing.

Next steps
- If you’d like, I can connect you with a sales specialist to scope a recurring program. Could you share:
  - Your primary shipping destinations (US, Canada, or international)?
  - Estimated monthly/quarterly volume and which methods you expect to use (standard vs. expedited vs. overnight)?
  - Any preferred delivery times or signature requirements?

Would you like me to loop in a sales representative now or provide their direct contact? If you’d prefer, you can reach sales@officeflow.com or call 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2 (Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–7:00 PM EST).

column1: Hi, I'm managing office supply procurement for our company and I wanted to ask about your return policy for bulk orders specifically. If we place a large order — say 30 or 40 units of an item — and it turns out we over-ordered, are we able to return the excess? Are there any restocking fees or different terms that apply for higher-volume returns versus a standard single-pack return?
column6:
Hi there—great question. I’m happy to help clarify bulk returns.

What bulk orders (30–40 units) fall under
- Return window: 30 days from delivery.
- RMA: An RMA is required for all returns and is valid for 14 days from issue.
- What can be returned: unopened items in original packaging, defective items, or items shipped in error. Opened paper reams aren’t eligible, and custom-printed or Final Sale items cannot be returned.
- Bulk-specific terms: Our published policy does not list separate restocking fees or terms for high-volume returns. For business accounts, customized return policies may apply, so terms can vary.

Fees and refunds
- Refunds: Processed to the original payment method within 5–7 business days after the return is inspected.
- Shipping charges: Non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective. Return shipping is usually the customer’s responsibility unless otherwise noted.
- Cancellations vs. returns: If you cancel an order after processing has begun, a 15% restocking fee may apply (this is in the ordering policy for cancellations, not specifically for returns).

How to start a bulk return
- Contact the Returns Department: returns@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3.
- You’ll need your order number and reason for the return. They’ll issue an RMA with a 14-day window to ship the items back.

Next steps
- Are the 30–40 units unopened and in original packaging? If so, I can help initiate the RMA process or connect you with a Returns rep to review your specific items.

Would you like me to start a return review for your bulk order or share the direct contact to the Returns team? Also, feel free to share the item numbers you’re considering returning.

column1: Hi, I'm handling supply procurement for our organization and I had a question about your policies — what's your process around large orders? Like, is there anything specific we need to know before placing one?
column6:
Hi there, I’d be happy to outline our large-order process.

Key points to know before placing a large order:
- How to order: Use our Online Web Portal (24/7) or contact our Sales Team at sales@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2. Hours: Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–7:00 PM EST; Sat 9:00 AM–2:00 PM EST.
- Minimums and bulk pricing: Most customers have a $50 minimum before tax/shipping, but established business accounts have no minimum. Bulk discounts exist for larger quantities; quotes are available.
- Business accounts: For high-volume needs, you can have a dedicated account manager and optional Net 30/Net 60 terms. PO processing is supported for established accounts. To set up, contact accounts@officeflow.com.
- Quotes: If you need bulk pricing, our sales team can provide a quote. Quotes are valid for 30 days. Include item numbers, quantities, and delivery address.
- Payment options: Card payments (Visa/Mastercard/AmEx/Discover) are supported; POs are accepted for established accounts; wire transfers available for large orders (contact accounting@officeflow.com).
- Special orders and lead times: Standard items process in 1 business day. Special or custom orders typically take 1–2 weeks from approval; deposits may be required for some items.
- Modifications/cancellations: Changes within 2 hours of ordering are allowed with no fees. After processing starts, cancellations may incur a 15% restocking fee; some items can’t be canceled once processing begins.
- Backorders and substitutions: If an item is temporarily unavailable, we’ll notify and you can wait, substitute, or cancel backorders (no penalty, and you’re not charged until shipped).
- Shipping for large orders: Business accounts can receive custom shipping rates and dedicated routes. Standard processing/shipping timelines apply; tracking is provided when shipped.
- What we’ll need from you to start: item list or rough SKU/description, desired quantities, delivery location, and whether you’d prefer a quote or a dedicated account manager.

Would you like me to connect you with our sales team for a bulk quote, or help set you up with a business account? If you share the items and approximate volumes, I can start getting you a preliminary quote.

column1: Hi, I'm the procurement lead for our company and I wanted to ask — what are your terms around damaged or defective items? We order in pretty significant volumes so I want to make sure we're covered, but I'm not entirely clear on what the process looks like on your end.
column6:
Hi there — thanks for reaching out. I’m happy to summarize our damaged/defective item terms and the process so you’re covered for high-volume orders.

Key points
- General returns: Items may be returned within 30 days with an RMA. Unopened items in original packaging are eligible; defective items are eligible even outside that window.
- Damaged or defective items: Defective/damaged items can be returned at any time. If you receive a defective item, you won’t be charged return shipping, and we’ll arrange a replacement. You can also request a refund when appropriate.
- On shipment damage (arrived damaged): Inspect on delivery. If damaged, notify us within 48 hours and we’ll arrange a replacement or refund immediately without requiring the damaged item to be returned first.

Process for defective/damaged items
1) Contact our Returns Dept with your order number and a brief explanation. If possible, include photos of the damage.
2) We’ll issue a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA). The RMA is valid for 14 days.
3) Ship the item back with the RMA clearly marked on the outside. Use original packaging if possible; insured shipping with tracking is recommended.
4) Replacement items ship immediately upon confirmation of the defect. Return shipping is covered for defective items.
5) Refunds (if chosen) are issued to the original payment method within 5–7 business days. Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective.

Additional details
- 30-day returns apply to unopened items in original packaging (custom-printed items and opened paper reams have restrictions).
- Exchanges follow the same RMA process; price differences may apply if exchanging for a different item.
- Business accounts may have customized return policies—your dedicated account manager can confirm specifics.

Contact information
- Returns Dept: returns@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3 (Hours: Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–6:00 PM EST)
- Damaged shipments (on delivery): fulfillment@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5 (Hours: Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–6:00 PM EST)

Would you like me to connect you with your dedicated account manager or start a returns ticket for a current or upcoming order? If yes, please share your company name and the relevant order number(s).

column1: Hi, I'm coordinating supplies for our enterprise account and I had a question — what's your general policy around orders? Like, are there any terms or conditions we should be aware of before we start placing regular bulk orders?
column6:
Hi there—happy to help. Here’s a concise overview of our ordering policy for enterprise/bulk orders:

- How to order: Online via the 24/7 web portal, or you can reach our Sales Team by phone or email. Account Managers are available for high-volume accounts.
  - Web: www.officeflow.com
  - Sales: 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2 or sales@officeflow.com
  - Accounts (billing/terms): accounts@officeflow.com

- Minimums: 
  - General minimum: $50 before tax/shipping.
  - Established business accounts: no minimum order requirement.

- Payment terms and methods:
  - Accepted: credit/debit cards, checks, money orders, and wire transfers for large orders.
  - Business accounts: Net 30 or Net 60 terms if credit-approved (soft credit check). Monthly statements are emailed to the billing contact.
  - Purchase orders: Accepted for established business accounts; must reference the PO number.

- Pricing and quotes:
  - Bulk discounts available for larger quantities; contract pricing for regular high-volume customers.
  - Quotes are valid for 30 days. For quotes, contact sales@officeflow.com.

- Order confirmations and changes:
  - You’ll receive an order confirmation by email with order details.
  - Modifications or cancellations are allowed within 2 hours of placing the order with no fees.
  - After processing starts, cancellations may incur a 15% restocking fee. Delivery address changes are possible in some cases after processing begins.

- Backorders and substitutions:
  - If an item is backordered, you’ll be offered a wait or a substitute. Backorders can be canceled with no penalty, and you’re not charged until the item ships.

- Special orders:
  - Custom quantities or items can be arranged. Typical lead times are 1–2 weeks after approval; deposits may be required.

- Account setup benefits:
  - Dedicated account manager, custom pricing, consolidated monthly billing, and easy PO processing.

- Next steps:
  - If you’d like, I can connect you with an account manager or start the business account setup. You can also apply online at www.officeflow.com/business or email accounts@officeflow.com.

Would you like me to connect you with a sales rep or start the business account onboarding for your enterprise? If you share your company name and approximate monthly spend, I can tailor the next steps.

Shipping policy for large orders (delivery timeframes and free shipping)
- Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days. Free shipping is available if your order is at or above the $100 merchandise value threshold (before tax).
- Expedited Shipping: 2-3 business days. Free shipping on orders $250+.
- Express Shipping: 1-2 business days.
- Overnight Shipping: Next business day.
- Processing: Orders placed before 2:00 PM EST ship same business day; standard items usually process in 1 business day (some items may take longer if they’re special-order).
- Coverage: United States (all 50 states, including AK/HI), Canada (all provinces/territories; duties/taxes may apply). International orders for large bulk requests are possible on request.
- Tracking: You’ll receive a tracking number by email when the order ships.

Net terms and invoicing for enterprise purchases
- Yes, we offer business account payment terms (Net 30 or Net 60) for qualified customers. Credit approval is required.
- Benefits include: dedicated account manager, consolidated monthly statements, and PO processing.
- How to apply: see www.officeflow.com/business or contact accounts@officeflow.com for assistance.

- What is your ship-to location (US/Canada, or both) and preferred shipping method?

column1: Hi, I'm the purchasing director for our organization and we recently received a bulk shipment of manila file folders and letter size envelopes. Unfortunately, about half the envelope packs arrived with damaged seals and a few of the file folder packs were the wrong size. Could you help me initiate a return and replacement for the affected items? We need this resolved quickly since our admin team is waiting on these supplies.
column6:
Hi there, I’m really sorry this happened—that’s frustrating and I know your admin team needs a quick fix. I can’t process returns directly, but you can start the process with our Returns Department right away. Here’s how to get it moving fast:

What to do
- Email the Returns Team at returns@officeflow.com or call 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3. They typically respond within 4 business hours.
- Include:
  - Order number and purchase date
  - Items affected (e.g., Manila file folders, Letter-size envelopes) and quantities
  - Brief description of issues (damaged envelope seals, wrong folder sizes)
  - Photos of the damage/incorrect items
  - Your desired resolution (replacement, credit, or refund)
  - Shipping address for replacements or pickup instructions

Ready-to-send email template
Subject: Return & Replacement Request for Order # [Order Number]

Hello Returns Team,

We received a bulk shipment on [date] that included:
- Manila file folders: [quantity], issue: wrong size on several packs
- Letter-size envelopes: [quantity], issue: damaged seals on about half of packs

Order/PO #: [order number]
Original carrier/tracking: [if known]

We are requesting:
- Returns authorization
- Replacements for the affected items
- Please confirm whether a credit is also acceptable if replacements are unavailable

Photos of the issues are attached.

Please advise on next steps, RMA numbers, and any required forms. Our preferred contact method is [email/phone], and we’d like replacements shipped to [shipping address].

Thank you,
[Your Name]
[Title]
[Company]
[Phone]

Would you like me to customize this draft for you? If you share your order number and the exact items/SKUs, I’ll tailor the message and you can paste it directly.

Extra help I can offer
- If you share the item SKUs, I can check stock availability for replacements and coordinate in a follow-up once the Returns Team approves.
- If you’d like, I can draft a second notice to the team requesting expedited handling given the admin team is waiting.

Would you like me to customize the template with your order details now, or would you prefer I draft a ready-to-send email once you provide the order number and item specifics? Also, do you want me to reach out with a quick note to the Returns Team to flag urgency?

column1: I've been trying to find your return policy on the website and honestly it's buried somewhere I can't seem to locate. Can you just tell me straight — how many days do I have to return something if it doesn't work out? I ordered some staplers last week and I'm not sure they're going to be the right fit for our office.
column6:
Thanks for checking in. Here’s the straight answer: you have 30 days from delivery to return items.

A few quick notes:
- Unopened products in original packaging are eligible for return within 30 days. If the staplers have been opened, they’re only eligible if they’re defective or the wrong item was shipped.
- Defective items can be returned at any time (exception to the 30-day window).
- Items shipped in error are eligible.
- Final Sale items cannot be returned.

How to start a return:
- Email: returns@officeflow.com or call 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3
- Have your order number and a brief reason for return ready
- They’ll issue an Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA), valid for 14 days

Refunds are processed to the original payment method in about 5-7 business days after we receive the return. Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective.

Would you like me to connect you with the Returns team or help determine if your staplers are eligible based on whether they’re still unopened?

column1: I ordered some spiral notebooks a couple weeks ago and now I'm realizing we might not need all of them. What's your policy on returning items that haven't been opened? I just want to know if I'm stuck with them or if there's a window to send them back. It's a little frustrating that I couldn't find this info anywhere on your site.
column6:
Thanks for asking — I know it can be frustrating not to find policy info quickly. Here’s our returns guidance for unopened items:

- Eligibility: Returns are allowed within 30 days of delivery for unopened items in their original packaging. Unopened items are eligible; opened items (like some paper reams) may not be returnable. Final Sale items cannot be returned. Items without packaging are not accepted.
- Process: You’ll need a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA). Contact our Returns Department with your order number to get the RMA. The RMA is valid for 14 days from issue. Ship the item back with the RMA clearly labeled on the outside of the package, ideally in original packaging with the packing slip. We recommend insured shipping with tracking.
- Refunds: refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5–7 business days after we receive and inspect the return. Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective.
- Exceptions: Defective or damaged items can be returned at any time. Items shipped in error are also eligible for return.

If you’d like, I can help you start the return. Please share your order number and the notebook details, or you can reach Returns directly at:
- Email: returns@officeflow.com
- Phone: 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3

Would you like me to check your order status or guide you through the RMA process now?

column1: I've been trying to figure out your shipping policy for the past 15 minutes and your website is honestly no help. Can you just tell me how long it takes for orders to arrive? I need to place an order for some office supplies and I'm on a deadline here.
column6:
Hi there—I know timing is tight, and I’m happy to help get you an answer quickly.

Here’s the shipping timeline by method (after processing):

- Standard: 3-5 business days
- Expedited: 2-3 business days (place by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing; otherwise ships next business day)
- Express: 1-2 business days (place by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing; Mon–Thu only)
- Overnight: Next business day (place by 12:00 PM EST; Mon–Thu only)

Processing time (before shipping):
- Orders placed before 2:00 PM EST ship the same day.
- Standard items typically process in 1 business day; some special orders can take 1–2 weeks.

Delivery coverage:
- United States (all 50 states, including AK/HI)
- Canada (plus duties/taxes; customs 1–2 extra days)
- International on request for large orders

Tracking:
- You’ll receive a tracking number by email when it ships. Check status at www.officeflow.com/track.

If you want a precise ETA, tell me:
- the item numbers (or a few candidate items)
- destination (zip code and country)
- your preferred shipping method

I can then check current stock and give you an exact delivery estimate. In the meantime, if you’re near a deadline, Overnight or Express are your fastest options. Need anything else in the meantime?

column6:
I’m sorry your pens arrived leaking—that’s frustrating. You don’t have to return the full 12-pack.

Here's how we can help you right away:
- You can return only the defective items and choose either a refund or a replacement.
- To start, file a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) with our Returns Department. They’ll issue the RMA (valid for 14 days) and arrange the next steps. For defective items, you won't be charged for return shipping.
- If you want a refund: refunds are issued to your original payment method and typically processed in 5–7 business days after we receive the item.
- If you want replacements: we’ll ship replacement pens immediately once the defect is confirmed.

- Your order number
- How many pens are defective/leaking (or include photos if possible)

- You can contact Returns directly: returns@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3 (response within 4 business hours).

column1: I ordered some supplies recently and honestly I'm still not clear on how your whole return thing works — like, is there a deadline or do I just have to deal with whatever I get? It'd be nice if this stuff was easier to find.
column6:
Hi there! I’m glad you asked—I can help simplify our returns.

Key points:
- Return window: You can return items within 30 days of delivery.
- RMA required: All returns need a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA). The RMA is valid for 14 days from issue.
- What’s eligible: Unopened items in original packaging, defective items, or items shipped in error. Final sale, opened paper reams, and items without packaging are not eligible.
- Exceptions: Defective or damaged items can be returned at any time (even after 30 days).

How the return works:
1) Contact the Returns Department with your order number and reason for return. They’ll issue your RMA. Email returns@officeflow.com or call 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3 (Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–6:00 PM EST). They respond within 4 business hours.
2) Ship the item back with the RMA clearly on the outside of the package. Use original packaging if possible and include your packing slip. We recommend insured shipping with tracking.
3) Refunds are processed in 5–7 business days to the original payment method. Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective. Return shipping is usually the customer’s responsibility unless otherwise noted.
4) Defective items: Contact us within 48 hours of delivery if possible. Provide photos if you can. We can arrange a prepaid return label or pickup, and a replacement ships immediately once the defect is confirmed.
5) Exchanges: Same RMA process as returns; price differences may apply. Exchanges ship after we receive and inspect the return.

If you have a specific order you’re thinking about, I can help start the process. Just share your order number and the item(s) you want to return, and I’ll guide you step-by-step. Would you like me to connect you with our Returns team or provide the contact info again? Is there anything else you’re unsure about?

column6:
Thanks for checking—we do back our products, and I can help explain how it works.

Short answer: we don’t offer a separate product warranty, but defective or damaged items are covered under our Returns & Refunds Policy. Here’s how it works:

- When to return or replace
  - Most items: eligible for return within 30 days of delivery (with an RMA).
  - Defective/damaged items: can be returned or replaced at any time, even after 30 days.
  - Exceptions: opened paper reams, custom-printed items, and Final Sale items are not eligible.

- How to start (defects or standard returns)
  - Contact our Returns Department to get an RMA (required for all returns). Provide your order number and reason for return.
  - RMA is valid for 14 days. Please mark the RMA on the outside of the package and use original packaging if possible.

- What happens next
  - Refunds: processed to your original payment method in 5–7 business days after we receive and inspect the return.
  - Shipping charges: non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective. For defective items, shipping charges are typically refunded.
  - If defective: we’ll arrange pickup or send a prepaid return label at no cost. Replacement items ship immediately after confirmation of the defect.

- For business accounts
  - Some accounts may have customized return policies. Your account manager can confirm specifics.

column1: I'm getting a little annoyed here — I've been trying to figure out if you guys have any kind of cancellation policy AND what your shipping costs look like, but your website keeps sending me in circles. Can you just lay it out for me? Like, if I place an order for some binder clips and copy paper today, how quickly does it ship, and what happens if I need to cancel before it goes out? I just want clear answers before I spend any money.
column6:
I hear you—and I’ll lay this out clearly.

Cancellation policy
- Before processing starts: cancellations or full modifications are allowed within 2 hours of ordering with no fees.
- After processing starts: cancellations may incur a 15% restocking fee on the order total. Modifications are usually limited to delivery address changes.
- Custom or special-order items: cannot be cancelled once processing has started.
- Backorders: you can cancel backorders anytime without penalty.
- If you’re canceling because of a shipping error or defect, our Returns team handles refunds/replacements per policy.

Shipping costs and timing (for a standard scenario)
- Processing: Orders received before 2:00 PM EST ship the same business day. Standard items take about 1 business day to process; after 2:00 PM EST they ship the next business day.
- Standard Shipping: 3–5 business days, $8.95 flat rate. Free shipping on orders that reach the $100+ merchandise threshold.
- Expedited Shipping: 2–3 business days, $15.95 flat rate. Orders must be placed by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing; free shipping on $250+ orders.
- Express Shipping: 1–2 business days, $24.95 flat rate. Order by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing.
- Overnight Shipping: Next business day, $39.95 flat rate. Order by 12:00 PM EST for same-day processing.

If you order binder clips and copy paper today
- If you place the order before 2:00 PM EST and choose Standard, it will ship the same day and arrive in about 3–5 more days after dispatch (rough total ~4–6 days from order).
- If you need it faster, Expedited or Express can get it to you sooner per the times above.
- To cancel before it ships: contact the Sales Team immediately (sales@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2). If you’re past the 2-hour window or processing has started, a 15% restocking fee may apply.

column1: I need to cancel an order I placed yesterday for some spiral notebooks and blue ballpoint pens — I accidentally ordered way more than we actually need. The order number is ORD-5538. Can you take care of that for me? I'm a little irritated because your website doesn't seem to have any kind of cancel button anywhere in the order details.
column6:
Hi there, I’m really sorry you’re hitting friction with cancellation. I can help you get this sorted.

Do you know if ORD-5538 has started processing or shipped? If it hasn’t started processing yet, we can often cancel with no fees. If processing has begun, a 15% restocking fee may apply. If it’s already shipped, you’d handle it as a return once it arrives back, using our standard Returns process.

How to proceed right now
- If not started processing or you’re unsure: contact our Sales Team immediately to request a cancellation.
  - Email: sales@officeflow.com
  - Phone: 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2
  - Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–7:00 PM EST; Saturday 9:00 AM–2:00 PM EST
  - Please include ORD-5538 and a brief note that you’d like to cancel the order.
- If processing has started or you’re unsure: you may still cancel, but a 15% restocking fee could apply. Our Sales Team can confirm the exact status and any fees.
- If the order has already shipped: you can return the items once delivered using Returns. See details below:
  - Returns must have an RMA from Returns Department (returns@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3). RMA is valid for 14 days.
  - Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5–7 business days after we receive the return.

If you’d like, I can draft a quick note you can copy-paste to Sales to speed things up. Just say the word and I’ll tailor it to ORD-5538.

Would you like me to draft that email—or would you prefer I simply pass along the steps to you? And is ORD-5538 already shipped or still in processing?

column6:

A quick heads-up on what’s possible:
- If your order hasn’t started processing yet, we can usually modify it (add items) within about 2 hours of placement with no fees.
- If it’s already processing, changes are limited to delivery address updates. Cancelling a processed order can incur a 15% restocking fee.
- If you’re hoping to avoid a second shipping charge, the fastest route is to coordinate with our sales team to see if we can modify the current order or cancel it (if still eligible) and re-place a single order with both items.

- Your order number
- The exact dry erase marker product(s) you want (item numbers if you have them)
- Rough check: do you know whether your order has started processing or shipped?

In the meantime, you can also check your order status yourself in your account portal or track status at www.officeflow.com/track. If you’d rather, you can email sales@officeflow.com or call 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2, and our Sales Team can help coordinate edits or a consolidated shipment.
